interpretation: Standard focus measures are useful blur detectors but can reward added high-frequency noise. This fixed comparison tests whether each higher-is-better score orders nested blur and noise perturbations of the same official CT crops.

protocol.normalization: shared crop p1/p99 followed by fixed [0,1] metric bounds
protocol.noise_nesting: one standard-normal field scaled by every noise sigma
protocol.selection: no baseline parameters were tuned on these cubes

crop.selection_strategy: maximum label-1 count on a 32-voxel grid, labels sampled every 4 voxels
